channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Guirassy scores a hat trick in vain for Dortmund as Barcelona advances to Champions League semis
item.description: DORTMUND, Germany (AP) — Serhou Guirassy and Borussia Dortmund did what no else has been able to in 2025 — they beat Barcelona. It still wasn't enough to reach the Champions League semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodger Stadium to host baseball, with surfing and cricket outside Los Angeles at 2028 Olympics
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The 2028 Los Angeles Olympics will feature baseball at Dodger Stadium in its return to the program with surfing and cricket held outside the city as part of an updated venue plan released Tuesday by the organizing committee.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Maine gov brushes off state's trans athlete issue, says she's 'appalled' at Trump admin
item.description: Maine Gov. Janet Mills scored a victory against the Trump administration last week when a judge blocked the USDA's funding freeze on the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago Sky select Ajsa Sivka, Hailey Van Lith in WNBA Draft
item.description: The Chicago Sky selected Slovenian stretch four Ajsa Sivka and TCU point guard Hailey Van Lith with their top two picks in the WNBA draft to address their need for perimeter shooting and to bolster their rebounding efforts.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks host the Jets following Foligno's 2-goal game
item.description: Winnipeg Jets (54-21-4, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (23-46-10, in the Central Division) Chicago; Saturday, 7 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks host the Winnipeg Jets after Nick Foligno's two-goal game against the Boston Bruins in the Blackhawks' 5-2 win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: MTS ramps up Trolley service for Padres, Wave FC fans
item.description: ocal sports fans are in luck because the San Diego Metropolitan Transit System (MTS) is ramping up Trolley service this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Ed Lenderman, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU lands point guard Robert Wright III from Baylor
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It didn't take long for Kevin Young to find his new point guard. According to multiple reports, Baylor's Robert Wright III is transferring to BYU for his sophomore season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
